MiroThinker-1.7 & H1 Technical Report
arXiv:2603.15726v1  [cs.CL]  16 Mar 2026

1. Introduction
Recent work [1–3] shows robust planning
behavior in agents.

47.7 49.5

2. Metrics
Following [4, 5], we report API Match and
Correctness.

References
[1] Alpha Team. Alpha systems for planning.
